name: AACI
summary: Ambient-Agentic Clinical Intelligence runtime for Core-mediated draft composition, GOS binding, capture/transcription support, and operational automation.
invariants: AACI is one runtime inside HealthOS and never constitutional authority.
AACI draft composition remains Core-mediated and gate-bound.
AACI may consume GOS runtime binding but cannot override Core law.
Provider, retrieval, and transcription degradation must remain explicit.
allowedWork: Maintain AACI runtime, capture, transcription, draft composition, and GOS binding seams.
Add tests for draft-only, gate, provenance, and degradation behavior.
Repair Core-mediated handoff to Session Runtime when contracts drift.
Clarify docs that AACI is operational support, not final authority.
forbiddenWork: Bypass gate, consent, habilitation, provenance, or lawfulContext.
Bypass Core or GOS boundaries for convenience.
Fabricate provider, transcription, retrieval, referral, prescription, or clinical evidence.
knownGaps: AACI remains scaffold/foundation maturity and is not production clinical automation.
Semantic retrieval and broader provider hardening remain future work.
notes: AACI changes should usually be validated through Swift tests and first-slice smoke paths.
Territory metadata does not create AACI subagents or autonomous behavior.
